meta_title: Allergy Testing | My Private Clinic — Fulwood, Preston
meta_description: Targeted allergy blood testing in Fulwood, Preston. Results interpreted personally by Dr Faizal Secretary. Find out exactly what you're allergic to. From £119.
hero_h1: Find Out What Your Body Is Reacting To
hero_sub: Targeted allergy blood testing with results interpreted personally by Dr Faizal Secretary. Find out exactly what you're allergic to — and what to do about it.
hero_trust: From £119 · Results Explained Personally · IgE Blood Testing
intro_quote: You suspect you're allergic to something. You just don't know what.
intro_para_1: Allergy symptoms — skin reactions, digestive issues, respiratory problems — can have a significant impact on quality of life. Targeted IgE blood testing identifies exactly which allergens your immune system is reacting to.
intro_para_2: At My Private Clinic, results are never just emailed over. Dr Secretary interprets them with you and explains what they mean for your day-to-day life.

faqs.question: What can allergy testing identify?
faqs.answer: Food allergens (nuts, dairy, gluten, shellfish and more), environmental allergens (pollen, dust mites, pet dander), and others — depending on your symptoms and history.

faqs.question: What type of testing do you use?
faqs.answer: We use specific IgE blood testing — a highly accurate method that measures the immune response to individual allergens.

faqs.question: How much does allergy testing cost?
faqs.answer: From £119 for the consultation. The cost of specific test panels is quoted separately based on what allergens are tested.

faqs.question: What happens after testing?
faqs.answer: Results are explained personally by the doctor. He will advise on management, avoidance strategies, and referral to an allergist if needed.
